summary: Kang Hyunwoo undergoes a grueling training session with his master, who uses life-or-death combat to force him to develop the 'Fighting Spirit Emission' skill. Through intense pressure and dodging, Hyunwoo successfully masters the unique skill by focusing on overcoming his superior opponent. Following the successful training, the master commends him and suggests they travel to Buzzing Island after completing the Alley Leader Academy's final course, the 'Hell Camp' training.
key_moments: Hyunwoo survives his master's intense combat training, eventually triggering the creation of the 'Fighting Spirit Emission' skill.
Hyunwoo uses a clever tactical feint to land a hit on his master during their duel.
The master announces the beginning of the 'Hell Camp' training session, marking the final stage for the trainee.
